title: Category defaults (Phase 2 v2 frontmatter)
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter of components/src/categories/<slug>.md files. Six category MDs total (action, form-input-selection, navigation, data-display, feedback, overlays). Cross-references (motion_refs, accessibility) use slugs, not quoted names, so name drift is invisible to consumers. NOTE: CI enforcement of this schema lands with PR δ (Phase 2 v2); the schema lives here so it's available for IDE preview + AI-agent consumption ahead of the runtime.

_schema_version.description: Schema version pin. Currently locked to 1. Bumps require coordinated transformer + plugin reader updates.

slug.description: Kebab-case identifier; alphanumeric + hyphens; starts with letter. Doubles as the filename (minus .md) and the cross-reference target from component-level files.

label.description: Human-readable category name. Shown in tooling UIs and briefs.

authoring_status.description: Provenance state. engineer-seed = AI-drafted initial pass; team-reviewed = design-system lead has reviewed and accepted; team-authored = owned by the design-system lead end-to-end.

confidence.description: Per-card confidence levels. Authors lower individual cards when uncertain; brief consumers can downweight low-confidence defaults.

anatomy.description: Confidence in the anatomy parts list.

last_reviewed.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) of the most recent review. Updated whenever a human revises the file.

anatomy.description: Parts list for this category. Every category has at least container + label. Components in the category may extend (e.g. clear button, toggle thumb).

examples.name: Label
examples.description: caller-supplied text, bound to control via for/aria-labelledby

description.description: Brief description of what the part is and how it behaves. Keep to one sentence.
examples: caller-supplied text, bound to control via for/aria-labelledby

variants.description: Variant axes shared across the category. Components in the category may add their own axes.

values.description: Allowed values along this axis. Minimum 2 (an axis with only one value isn't an axis).

motion_refs.description: Motion pattern references by slug. Resolved against foundations/dist/tokens/motion.json at plugin read-time. Slug system protects against name drift.

examples.note: focus-ring fade-in on focus; opacity transition on disabled

ref.description: Motion pattern slug. Must exist in interaction-motion.json.

note.description: Optional component-specific note layered on top of the generic pattern.
examples: focus-ring fade-in on focus; opacity transition on disabled

accessibility.description: Accessibility requirement references by slug. Range 3-8 provides WCAG-evolution headroom while preventing dump-everything anti-pattern. Resolved against accessibility/dist/a11y-index.json at plugin read-time.

ref.description: Accessibility requirement slug. Must exist in accessibility/dist/a11y-index.json.

note.description: Optional component-specific override of the generic accessibility guidance.
examples: optional component-specific override of generic guidance

_extends.description: Reserved for future component-level overrides (component file extending its category default). Not yet implemented; documented as TBD.
